name: Gravy with Mushrooms and Onions
recipeIngredient: 1 large onion, halved and sliced thinly
3 cups turkey juices plus chicken stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a wide skillet.
2. Add the onion and mushrooms and sauté until browned.
3. Remove the onions and mushrooms, reserving them.
4. In a saucepan, heat the fat separated from roasting juices or additional butter.
5. Add the flour and stir until fully blended.
6. Cook for a few minutes while stirring constantly.
7. Slowly whisk in 2 cups of pan juices and stock into the saucepan.
8. Continue cooking and stirring until the gravy is smooth.
9. Simmer for 5 minutes.
10. If needed, add more stock to thin the mixture.
11. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
12. Add the reserved onions and mushrooms back into the gravy.
13. Makes about 3 1/2 cups.
